title: dracaena masoniana
intro: Dracaena masoniana, also known as the Chinese Evergreen or Dragon Tree, is a popular, low-maintenance houseplant known for its attractive, variegated leaves. The plant is believed to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be utilized in the treatment of various health issues. Consuming the plant or its extracts may provide health benefits such as reducing stress, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Dracaena masoniana are typically made by infusing the leaves in water or oil, which can be used as a natural remedy for various ailments.
